positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a vibrant, glowing constellation forming a celestial dreamscape. The scene depicts stylized galaxies, abstract nebula clouds in deep sapphire and emerald tones, and interconnected geometric stellar pathways, all rendered with crisp, continuous white linework against a rich, deep midnight indigo background. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed as a repeat pattern motif with strong visual hierarchy. Style: Nordic folklore meets modern geometric art. Lighting: Soft, ethereal cosmic glow emanating from the stars and nebulae. Composition: Symmetric, high contrast, scalable print design for apparel. --ar 1:1
